_example: Fill with {"file": "<path>", "reason": "<why>"}. Put spec/research files only — no code paths. Run `python3 .trellis/scripts/get_context.py --mode packages` to list available specs. Delete this line once real entries are added.

reason: LatencyPopover 必须严格遵循 popover pattern:outside-click 守卫 + Esc 守卫 + root ref + SSR typeof document 守卫
HintRow TooltipPortal :deep() 选择器必须在 scoped CSS 内;避免 portal DOM 逃逸
check 时验证子组件拆分遵循 SubagentDrawerHeader/ErrorCard 模式(0 store import / defineProps / scoped CSS)
迁移 CSS 时禁止硬编码 hex;全部走 var(--color-*) token
